label: 1528 CE
era_summary: Year 1528 (MDXXVIII) was a leap year starting on Wednesday of the Julian calendar, there is also a Leap year starting on Sunday of the Gregorian calendar.

rome_italy.summary: Active conflicts in 1528: Pope, Venice, Florence-emperor, Spain 1526-28; France, Venice, England, Genoa (till June 1528)-emperor, Spain, Genoa, 1526-30. No Maddison GDP coverage for this region — economy held at neutral 50, reflecting the thin pre-modern record outside the European core. Governance held at neutral (V-Dem coverage starts 1789).

andalusia_iberia.summary: Active conflicts in 1528: Pope, Venice, Florence-emperor, Spain 1526-28; France, Venice, England, Genoa (till June 1528)-emperor, Spain, Genoa, 1526-30; Spain-Yucatan (Mexico), 1527-28. Maddison records GDP/capita 1245 (ESP, 1528) — used as the economy proxy for the whole region. Governance held at neutral (V-Dem coverage starts 1789).
